scripts.dev: portless proxy start && turbo run dev @lightfast/app#mfe:proxy //#_inngest //#_qstash //#_github_emulator //#_linear_emulator //#_x_emulator //#_granola_emulator --concurrency=16 -F @lightfast/www -F @lightfast/app -F @lightfast/mcp -F @lightfast/storybook --continue
scripts._inngest: portless run --name inngest.lightfast sh -c 'npx inngest-cli@latest dev --no-discovery --host "$HOST" --port "$PORT" -u "$(portless get lightfast)/api/inngest"'
scripts._github_emulator: portless run --name github.lightfast sh -c 'CALLBACK_URL="$(portless get lightfast)/api/github/setup" PUBLIC_ORIGIN="$(portless get github.lightfast)" pnpm --filter @repo/github-emulator dev'
scripts._granola_emulator: portless run --name granola.lightfast sh -c 'PUBLIC_ORIGIN="$(portless get granola.lightfast)" pnpm --filter @repo/granola-emulator dev'
scripts._linear_emulator: portless run --name linear.lightfast sh -c 'PUBLIC_ORIGIN="$(portless get linear.lightfast)" pnpm --filter @repo/linear-emulator dev'
scripts._x_emulator: portless run --name x.lightfast sh -c 'CALLBACK_URL="$(portless get lightfast)/api/connectors/x/mcp" PUBLIC_ORIGIN="$(portless get x.lightfast)" pnpm --filter @repo/x-emulator dev'
